SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KANE, ROBERT FREDERICK SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR TONG, ERIC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANITA LEE'S MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT - THE MOTION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO MEET HER INITIAL BURDEN IN THE SLAPP ANALYSIS. CCP 425.16 DOES NOT APPLY TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT BECAUSE IT IS NOT A SLAPP. SEE ROBLES V. CHALILPOVIL (2010) 181 CAL. APP. 4TH 506. PLAINTIFF IS SUING TO RECOVER FOR SERVICES RENDERED. HIS COMPLAINT IS NOT BASED ON MS. LEE'S PETITIONING ACTIVITIES. EVEN IF IT WERE BASED ON PETITIONING ACTIVITIES (AND THE COURT FINDS IT IS NOT), MR. TONG HAS DEMONSTRATED A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING. SEE TONG AND CHEW DECLARATIONS. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEE IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: DIANA CHEN, CSR # 11312

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT KANE, TEL. NO. 982-1510 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSEPH M. BREALL, TEL. NO. 345-0545 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT ANITA LEE'S MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT - The motion is denied. Defendant fails to meet her initial burden in the SLAPP analysis. CCP 425.16 does not apply to plaintiff's complaint because it is not a SLAPP. See Robles v. Chalilpovil (2010) 181 Cal. App. 4th 506. Plaintiff is suing to recover for services rendered. His complaint is not based on Ms. Lee's petitioning activities. Even if it were based on petitioning activities (and the Court finds it is not), Mr. Tong has demonstrated a probability of prevailing. See Tong and Chew Declarations. Request for attorney's fee is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 =(302/MJM)
